title: Build analytics dashboard page with aggregate stats and quiz comparison
acceptance_criteria: Server component fetches aggregate analytics from GET /api/admin/analytics
Renders stat cards row: Total Engagements, Completions, Conversion Rate, Revenue, AOV
Renders date range picker that filters stats via ?from=/&to= query params
Renders quiz comparison table: quiz name, views, completions, conversion rate per quiz
Quiz comparison rows link to per-quiz analytics page /analytics/[id]
Empty state rendered when no analytics data exists
Loading state via Suspense (client fetching handled by a client island component)
Responsive layout: stat cards grid (2-col mobile, 4-col desktop)
Follows existing admin dashboard pattern (server component + client islands)
All data scoped to authenticated store
